headline: Earn up to 125,000 Marriott Bonvoy points with this limited-time offer
summary: These limited-time offers from Marriott can help new cardholders score a free hotel stay this summer.

headline: Wall Street Lunch: Quantinuum Soars 12% On Nasdaq Debut Following $1.7B IPO
summary:
Quantinuum (QNT) debuted on the Nasdaq at $68 a share, up 12% from its IPO price.
The quantum computing company, which is majority owned by Honeywell (HON), sold 28M shares at $60 each.

headline: Actabl Hires Global Hotel Engineering Leader as SVP of AI Asset Management
summary: Actabl today named Rob Bahl Senior Vice President, AI Asset Management, a move that puts decades of hotel engineering leadership experience behind the company's work to help owners and operators use AI to extend asset life, cut energy and labor costs, and run their buildings with excellence at scale.
